explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to **explicit mentions of abstract unifying concepts, particularly the word "theme" or its direct translations and closely related terms** (such as "theme," "tema," "thema," "thematic," "themes," "themed," and "topical").

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across multiple languages (English, Italian, Estonian, Dutch, Hungarian, Greek) and diverse domains including entertainment analysis, festival planning, scientific discourse, financial commentary, and personal reflection. It activates on text discussing central ideas in TV shows, art, years, events, books, or societal shifts, regardless of the specific subject matter.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: The high-activation texts consistently contain a word or phrase labeling a central, abstract subject or motif. The low-activation examples are almost exclusively concrete news headlines or event reports (crimes, political decisions, software updates, protests) that state facts without framing them around an overarching concept or named "theme."

4. **Closing interpretation**: This neuron detects linguistic markers of **metacommentary or conceptual framing**, where the text is explicitly about the identification, discussion, or naming of a unifying idea. It functions as a detector for when language is used to abstract and label the core subject of a discussion.

results.actual_text: ei ole täysin samanlainen kuin olympialaisissa nähty, mutta Rönkkösen mukaan se muka
results.plain_text: Olympiakultaa voittaneiden Leijonien turnauspaidat keräsivät ylistystä. Eteenkin voitokkaan loppuottelun jälkeen monet fanit kuitenkin ihmettelivät, miksi olympiapaitoja ei saanut ostettua Leijonien fanikaupasta. Syy löytyy paitojen valmistajasta, Jääkiekkoliiton myynti- ja markkinointijohtaja Lassi Rönkkönen vastaa Ilta-Sanomille. – Ne ovat Niken paitoja. Nike ei ole nähnyt Euroopan markkinoita tarpeeksi houkuttelevana. Olen kovistellut heitä vaikka kuinka kauan ja nyt näyttää siltä, että Niken paitoja voisi mahdollisesti saada jatkossa. Niken edustaja ei ole siis toimittanut Suomen olympiapaitoja myyntiin lainkaan. Rönkkönen pitää epätodennäköisenä, että kultapaitoja tulisi enää myyntiin missään kanavassa. Samasta ongelmasta kärsivät myös muut Euroopan kiekkomaat. Ainoastaan USA:n ja Kanadan olympiapaidat ovat myynnissä. Rönkkönen on kuitenkin tiedustellut, voisiko toukokuun koti-MM-kisojen pelipaitaa saada myyntiin ennen turnausta. MM-paita ei ole täysin samanlainen kuin olympialaisissa nähty, mutta Rönkkösen mukaan se mukailee Pekingin paitaa. – Ei ole se vanha MM-kisapaita, jossa oli liekkireunukset, hän tarkentaa. – Meille tulee paljon kyselyitä faneilta ja asiakkailta paidoista, ja olen välittänyt Nikelle viestit. Emme mekään ymmärrä, miksi he eivät toimita paitoja. Olympiapaitojen sijaan Leijonien fanikaupassa on tarjolla Warriorin valmistama replica EHT-turnauksessa käytettävästä paidasta. Paitaa koristaa Jääkiekkoliiton yhteistyökumppanien mainokset. – Warriorin paidoista on tulossa uusia malleja myös ilman mainoksia, Rönkkönen paljastaa. Leijonien pelipaitoja myydään Rönkkösen mukaan tuhansia vuosittain.

results.plain_text: Monaco vürsti sohitütrena tuntud Jazmin Grace Grimaldi tähistab jõule koos oma uue kallima, USA rokilegend John Cougar Mellencampi vennapoja Ian Mellencampiga.  24aastane kaunitar, kelle ema on USA maakler Tamara Rotolo, on paljutõotav laulja, kes loodab ilma teha Broadwayl. Pikajuukseline Ian (34) on tuntud Calvin Kleini ja Tom Fordi modellina, kuid tema süda kuulub rokkmuusikale. Oma debüüt-EP andis noormees välja kolm aastat tagasi.

results.actual_text: project to date and have contracted six sculptors to add a series of geologically themed human sized sculptures to the Northern Ireland Environment Agency-owned reserve. Part of the site
results.plain_text: Whitemountain and District Community Association (WDCA) has condemned the illegal dumping of dozens of car tyres at Belshaw’s Quarry National Nature Reserve as “totally irresponsible”.  Shortly before Christmas local residents discovered that almost 100 tyres had been dumped over the fence of the property on Bensons Road, near Lisburn. The fly-tipping is thought to have taken place on the night of December 16, and the community association has appealed to anyone with information about the culprits to contact police at Lisburn Station. Commenting on the incident, John Belshaw, the chairperson of WDCA, said: “Locals and visitors frequent the reserve, now actually an Area of Special Scientific Interest, and to find this amount of tyres dumped shows premeditated irresponsible behaviour by those involved. “The car tyres are clean and freshly smelling of rubber so have most likely come from one or more tyre dealers. No doubt those responsible had some financial reasons for their activity, but I reckon there are enough clues for police to investigate. “Fly-tipping is still happening too frequently in rural areas and if anyone sees such activity they should report it to the police.” Mr Belshaw continued: “We have just launched our biggest project to date and have contracted six sculptors to add a series of geologically themed human sized sculptures to the Northern Ireland Environment Agency-owned reserve. Part of the site works will hopefully also see a state-of-the-art solar powered web based security system installed. This project idea has been the best part of a year in the making and as a community group that has a focus on environmental matters, fly-tipping on this scale is something that we hope the police will thoroughly investigate. “If anyone knows anything then they could also send out the word through our latest social media presence on Nextdoor – Pond Park area. Through that facility and our Facebook page locals can also express their interest in upcoming workshops and activities.” Whitemountain and District Community Association aims to help connect residents of the areas bounded by Sheepwalk Road, Pond Park Road, Beanstown Road, Glenavy Road and Whinney Hill in the townlands of Whitemountain, Aghnahough, Beanstown, Ballyclough and just north of Lisburn. Further information about the group is available online at www.whitemountain.org.uk

predictions.text: “We have just launched our biggest project to date and have contracted six sculptors to add a series of geologically themed human sized sculptures to the Northern Ireland Environment Agency-owned reserve. Part of the site works will hopefully also see a state-of-the-art solar powered web based security system installed.
predictions.reasoning: The text explicitly uses the word 'themed' in 'geologically themed', directly matching the neuron's description.

predictions.text: “Locals and visitors frequent the reserve, now actually an Area of Special Scientific Interest, and to find this amount of tyres dumped shows premeditated irresponsible behaviour by those involved.
predictions.reasoning: The text mentions a designated scientific interest area, which is an abstract unifying concept for the reserve.

predictions.text: Whitemountain and District Community Association (WDCA) has condemned the illegal dumping of dozens of car tyres at Belshaw’s Quarry National Nature Reserve as “totally irresponsible”.
predictions.reasoning: The text describes a concrete event of illegal dumping, which lacks abstract conceptual framing.

results.plain_text:
Zaia: «Dal Veneto  pronti i soccorsi  per la Sicilia»
                       pronti i soccorsi per la Sicilia» 
        
               La Protezione civile del Veneto e quella vicentina sono pronte a partire per aiutare le popolazioni dell'area etnea in Sicilia. La scossa di stamane di magnitudo 4.8 sull'Etna, la più intensa da quando il vulcano ha ripreso la sua attività eruttiva tre giorni fa, era stata preceduta da uno sciame sismico iniziato verso mezzanotte. I volontari veneti sono pronti per partire per l'isola e per pianificare le misure di assistenza alla gente e di controllo dell'agibilità degli edifici.  «Il Veneto è al fianco della comunità siciliana in questo momento di festa che si è tramutato in tragedia». Lo dice il presidente della Regione, Luca Zaia, che riferisce di essersi «già messo in contatto con il capo della Protezione civile nazionale Borrelli» e di «aver messo a disposizione aiuti dal Veneto, qualora fossero ritenuti necessari».  «Ho sentito Borrelli stamattina, appena appresa la notizia del terremoto - riferisce Zaia - e con grande efficienza era già operativo in prefettura. Gli ho garantito che le colonne mobile dei volontari sono pronte a partire dal Veneto in qualsiasi momento».

predictions.text: «Il Veneto è al fianco della comunità siciliana in questo momento di festa che si è tramutato in tragedia». Lo dice il presidente della Regione, Luca Zaia, che riferisce di essersi «già messo in contatto con il capo della Protezione civile nazionale Borrelli» e di «aver messo a disposizione aiuti dal Veneto, qualora fossero ritenuti necessari».
predictions.reasoning: The text frames the event as a tragedy, which is an abstract unifying concept.

I volontari veneti sono pronti per partire per l'isola e per pianificare le misure di assistenza alla gente e di controllo dell'agibilità degli edifici.

results.actual_text: lunes, 18 de marzo 2019 Escuchar las horas
results.plain_text: lunes, 18 de marzo 2019 Escuchar las horas completas Con Carlos Herrera Con Pilar Cisneros y Fernando de Haro Con Ángel Expósito Con Paco González, Manolo Lama y Pepe Domingo Castaño Con Juanma Castaño Con Cristina López Schlichting DIRECTO Más programas Solo en cope.es Lo más seguido Herrera en COPE España Las voces de COPE Volver Resultados deportivos Fútbol Historias Santoral Evangelio hoy San Lucas 6, 36-38 Sociedad TRÁFICO ACCIDENTES Diez personas han muerto -cuatro de ellas motoristas, un ciclista y un peatón- en los nueve accidentes mortales ocurridos en las carreteras españolas desde las tres de la tarde del viernes hasta las doce de la noche de ayer, domingo.,Según ha informado la Dirección General de Tráfico (DGT), el día más trágico en las carreteras este fin de semana fue el sábado, con seis siniestros mortales y siete muertos, cuatro de ellos motoristas, en carreteras de Madrid, Valencia, Astur Agencia EFE Tiempo de lectura: 1' 18 mar 2019 - 11:03 Actualizado 11:04 Diez personas han muerto -cuatro de ellas motoristas, un ciclista y un peatón- en los nueve accidentes mortales ocurridos en las carreteras españolas desde las tres de la tarde del viernes hasta las doce de la noche de ayer, domingo. Según ha informado la Dirección General de Tráfico (DGT), el día más trágico en las carreteras este fin de semana fue el sábado, con seis siniestros mortales y siete muertos, cuatro de ellos motoristas, en carreteras de Madrid, Valencia, Asturias y Cáceres. En los otros dos accidentes mortales del sábado murieron otras tres personas, una en un siniestro en Madrid y otras dos en Zaragoza. El viernes se registró un accidente mortal con un fallecido, y el domingo dos siniestros y dos fallecidos, uno de ellos un ciclista que murió en el acto tras impactar con un coche. Tres de los accidentes fueron colisiones, dos salidas de vía, un vuelco y un atropello a peatón. Siete de los siniestros se produjeron en vías convencionales y los otros dos en autopista o autovía. En lo que va de año, 198 personas han perdido la vida en accidente en las vías interurbanas. Twitter Facebook whatsapp 12:25 12:24 12:23 12:19 12:18
